args:
{"mode": "run", "command": "python3 -c "
from balanced import balanced
tests = [
    ('([]{})', True),
    ('([)]', False),
    ('hello (world)', True),
    ('(', False),
    ('', True),
    ('[({})]', True),
    ('[{]}', False),
    ('a(b[c{d}e]f)g', True),
    ('((()))', True),
    ('((())', False),
    ('())', False),
]
for s, expected in tests:
    res = balanced(s)
    if res != expected:
        print(f'FAIL: {s!r} -> {res}, expected {expected}')
        break
else:
    print('All extra tests pass')
"", "reason": "Run additional edge-case tests to ensure implementation is robust beyond the 5 verification cases.", "tail_lines": 10}
name: exec
